entities.description: As a subsection of '2.2案例测试', this section describes the testing scenario involving the evaluation board subscribing and the upper machine publishing messages in the MQTT communication protocol case study.
Refers to the hardware device used for testing, specifically the evaluation board involved in the MQTT communication protocol case.
Refers to the higher-level machine or software system that publishes messages in the MQTT communication protocol setup.
Refers to the MQTT communication method where the evaluation board receives messages from the upper machine.
Refers to the MQTT communication method where the upper machine sends messages to the evaluation board.

relations.description: The concept of '评估板' (evaluation board) is a primary topic of section 2.2.2.
The concept of '上位机' (upper machine) is a primary topic of section 2.2.2.
The concept of '订阅' (subscription) is a primary topic of section 2.2.2.
The concept of '发布' (publication) is a primary topic of section 2.2.2.
